title: Route Relic
description: Tracks your movement and lets you save and visualize routes on maps
body:
**Route Relic is a utility mod that allows you to track, save, and visualize your movement paths**

With Route Relic, you can start recording your journey, stop it at any time, and view the total distance traveled. Your routes can be saved and even drawn directly onto maps, making it easy to document paths, plan builds, or mark explored areas.

Features
-  Track your movement in real time
-  Start and stop route recording with a single item
-  Draw recorded routes directly onto maps
-  Set anchor points for precise positioning
-  Customize route color using dyes
-  Switch between distance units
-  Automatically save route snapshots as images
 

**Craft recipe**

  ![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1784313a617d59b29013d6511377bfc9f037be77.png)

  **Colorize**
  
![Colorize route](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9515eced1f6f09c8238f66a3234909a196b5462.gif)

**Looks on vanilla maps**

![Looks on vanilla maps:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0553fe52be31a674ba2128f79eda461cb29bcfd.png)

Support:
[Atlas Map Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5e0bdc6270a0c88ab3c6fe587bfa146762cf256.png)

Simple, lightweight, and fully integrated into vanilla gameplay — Route Relic helps you turn your adventures into visible paths. 
New features maybe be added in the future
